commands.review_summary:
The branch adds a non-interactive legacy cron JSON/run-log migration path to doctor config preflight and refactors doctor cron repair so interactive doctor and preflight share the same import, normalize, and archive logic.

PR surface: Source +117, Tests +91. Total +208 across 5 files.

Reproducibility: yes. The linked reports give a concrete v2026.5.28 to v2026.6.1 upgrade path, and current main source shows cron runtime reads SQLite while config preflight does not run cron migration; I did not execute a live package upgrade in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] No narrow automated repair remains; maintainers need to decide whether this compatibility-sensitive automatic migration behavior should land.
